server/tests/test_pipeline_bmp.py :: test_load_raster_from_bmp_bytes
def test_load_raster_from_bmp_bytes() -> None:
    payload = bmp_bytes(solid_raster(18, 14, 90, 120, 150))
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(payload, "photo.bmp")
    assert raster.width == 18
    assert raster.height == 14

server/tests/test_pipeline_bmp.py :: test_convert_bmp_to_jpeg
def test_convert_bmp_to_jpeg() -> None:
    payload = bmp_bytes(gradient_raster(20, 16))
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(payload, "gradient.bmp")
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/jpeg", "jpg"), max_mb=1)
    assert output.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_pipeline_bmp.py :: test_convert_bmp_to_png
def test_convert_bmp_to_png() -> None:
    payload = bmp_bytes(solid_raster(10, 10, 20, 40, 60))
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(payload, "solid.bmp")
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/png", "png"), max_mb=2)
    assert output.startswith(b"\x89PNG")

server/tests/test_pipeline_bmp.py :: test_convert_bmp_to_gif
def test_convert_bmp_to_gif() -> None:
    payload = bmp_bytes(solid_raster(12, 12, 200, 100, 50))
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(payload, "icon.bmp")
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"), max_mb=1)
    assert output.startswith(b"GIF89a")

server/tests/test_pipeline_bmp.py :: test_bmp_gradient_through_email_preset
def test_bmp_gradient_through_email_preset() -> None:
    from image_tool.service import convert_image

    payload = bmp_bytes(gradient_raster(64, 48))
    output, target = convert_image(payload, "wallpaper.bmp", None, preset_name="email")
    assert target.extension == "jpg"
    assert len(output) < 400_000
